summary: Short Cassidy noted despite its seemingly endless jam potential; recording details unknown
review: The sole fan comment highlights the song "Cassidy," noting that its roughly 5½‑minute length feels too brief for a jam that seems capable of extending much longer. No information is provided about the source or technical quality of the recording, leaving the audio fidelity indeterminate.
